name: lavey
description: Lavey monorepo — run scripts from the repo root (lavey_frontend + lavey_backend).

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix lavey_backend" "npm run dev --prefix lavey_frontend"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix lavey_backend && npm run build --prefix lavey_backend
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix lavey_backend && npm install --prefix lavey_frontend
